title: Postgres 16 upgrade across data-infra fleet
description: Owning the multi-quarter upgrade from PG 14 → 16 across the data-infra fleet. Includes extension compatibility audit (pgvector, pg_partman, pg_repack), logical-replication-driven cutover, and per-tenant validation. Wrote the upgrade RFC and runbook.

title: Investigate query planner regression on partitioned tables
description: Filed by the analytics team — query plans on the partitioned events table were occasionally choosing the wrong partition. Root cause was a stale histogram on the partition-key column after a bulk load; planner fell back to a sequential scan. Fix: cron-based ANALYZE on the affected partition + a lightweight planner hint where it matters.

title: Document our consistency model for cross-region reads
description: Wrote up the consistency model for cross-region reads (eventual within 200ms p99, with opt-in strong consistency via primary routing). Doc has been cited in 4 design reviews this quarter.
